title: mabrya coccinea
intro: Mabrya coccinea, also known as the scarlet beebush, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mabrya coccinea include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Mabrya coccinea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for various medicinal applications.
